# Leadshine Toys

> Your trusted online destination for quality kids toys, educational games, and creative supplies in India.

Leadshine Toys is an e-commerce store specializing in toys, games, art supplies, school essentials, and kids accessories for children of all ages. We offer products from trusted brands with a focus on safety, education, and fun.

## Product Categories

- [Shop All Products](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/shop-all): Browse our complete catalog of toys and games.
- [Toys & Games](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/toys-and-games): Action figures, board games, puzzles, and more.
- [Art & Crafts](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/art-and-crafts): Creative supplies for young artists.
- [School Essentials](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/school-essentials): Stationery, bags, and supplies for school.
- [Kids Accessories](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/kids-accessories): Stylish accessories for children.
- [New Arrivals](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/new-arrivals): Latest products added to our store.
- [Trending](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/trending): Most popular products right now.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/): Main storefront with featured products and categories.
- [About Us](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/about-us): Our story, mission, and values.
- [Privacy Policy](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/privacy-policy): How we handle your data.
- [Terms of Service](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/terms-of-service): Usage terms and conditions.
- [Refund Policy](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/refund-policy): Return and refund information.
- [Shipping Policy](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/shipping-policy): Delivery options and timelines.

## Key Features

- Free shipping on orders over ₹500
- Safe and certified products for all age groups
- Age-based and price-based product filtering
- Secure checkout with Razorpay payment gateway

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://leadshine-main.lovable.app/llms-full.txt): Extended information for LLMs.
